plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: A simple test plugin that shows a greeting toast on startup.
plugins.author: Snowify Team

plugins.name: Internet Radio
plugins.description: Browse and listen to thousands of internet radio stations worldwide.
plugins.author: ssantss

plugins.name: Desktop Notifications
plugins.description: Shows a system notification whenever a new track starts playing, with the track title, artist, and album art.
plugins.author: Snowify Team

plugins.name: Song Downloader
plugins.description: Adds a download button to the player bar. Click it to save the currently playing song as an MP3 to any folder on your device.
plugins.author: Snowify Team

plugins.name: SoundCloud Source
plugins.description: Adds SoundCloud as a fallback song source. When YouTube is unavailable, Snowify streams from SoundCloud automatically.
plugins.author: Snowify Team

plugins.name: Spotify Metadata
plugins.description: Enriches tracks with Spotify metadata: genres, popularity, and artist images. No account required.
plugins.author: Snowify Team

themes.name: Nord
themes.description: An arctic, north-bluish color palette. Clean and minimal with a cool, icy aesthetic.
themes.author: Snowify Team

themes.name: Tokyo Night
themes.description: A dark theme inspired by the neon lights of Tokyo at night. Deep blues and soft purples.
themes.author: Snowify Team

themes.name: Catppuccin Mocha
themes.description: Soothing pastel tones for the high-spirited. Warm purples and soft lavenders.
themes.author: Snowify Team
